queries.name: small_filter
queries.sql: SELECT id, value, ts FROM analytics.public.events WHERE user_id = 42 LIMIT 50

queries.name: selective_join
queries.sql:
SELECT e.id, u.name, e.value
FROM analytics.public.events e
JOIN analytics.public.users  u ON e.user_id = u.id
WHERE u.region = 'us-east-1'
LIMIT 100

queries.name: daily_agg
queries.sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', ts) AS d, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM analytics.public.events
WHERE ts > DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

queries.name: topn_users
queries.sql:
SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM analytics.public.events
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC
LIMIT 100
